summary_one_line_zh: 推理时搜索、代理自我改写、合规风控三条线同时在重塑产品栈
summary_one_line_en: Inference-time search, self-editing agents, and compliance pressure are reshaping the stack.

items.title_zh: 多样性训练提升搜索表现
items.why_zh: 直接影响推理时搜索/采样管线：训练目标开始为 test-time search 服务，而非只追单点困惑度。
items.why_en: Training is being optimized for inference-time search, not just standalone perplexity.
items.so_what_zh: 把你的 reranker/beam/树搜流程加一组“多样性训练”对照实验。
items.so_what_en: Add a diversity-training ablation to your reranker/beam search stack.

items.title_zh: 代理可自我改写以修复失败
items.why_zh: 它把“上线后修复”前移到模型/代理闭环内，意味着 agent 系统需要把源码重写、回归验证纳入运行时。
items.why_en: Post-deploy fixes move into the agent loop itself: source rewriting plus regression checks become runtime concerns.
items.so_what_zh: 给你的 agent 加一个只读补丁沙箱，先让它改代码再跑回归。
items.so_what_en: Put your agent in a patch sandbox and require regression runs before merge.

items.title_zh: FTC 正在打击“AI 听音”营销
items.why_zh: 这不是公关新闻，是产品合规边界：凡涉及语音/行为推断的 AI 营销主张，审计和措辞风险正在实质上升。
items.why_en: This is a product-compliance boundary shift: voice and behavioral inference claims now carry real audit and wording risk.
items.so_what_zh: 立刻审查你们的语音/洞察/个性化文案，删掉不可证实的推断表述。
items.so_what_en: Audit voice/insight/personalization copy and remove any unverifiable inference claims.
